code: import React from'react';import TabPage from'../../components/common/TabPage';import{FiShield,FiUsers,FiBriefcase,FiDollarSign,FiClock,FiBookmark}from'react-icons/fi';import AdminUsers from'./AdminUsers';import AdminJobTitles from'./AdminJobTitles';import AdminPayGrades from'./AdminPayGrades';import AdminWorkShifts from'./AdminWorkShifts';import AdminOrganization from'./AdminOrganization';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const tabs=[{key:'users',label:'Users',icon:FiUsers,component:AdminUsers},{key:'job-titles',label:'Job Titles',icon:FiBriefcase,component:AdminJobTitles},{key:'pay-grades',label:'Pay Grades',icon:FiDollarSign,component:AdminPayGrades},{key:'work-shifts',label:'Work Shifts',icon:FiClock,component:AdminWorkShifts},{key:'organization',label:'Organization',icon:FiBookmark,component:AdminOrganization}];const AdminPage=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TabPage,{tabs:tabs,defaultTab:"users",moduleIcon:FiShield,moduleTitle:"Admin"});export default AdminPage;
